items.title: Sociale media vaak gebruikt, maar niet vertrouwd als 'bron' van nieuws

items.title: News sites are the new newspapers: People are abandoning them for social media
items.summary: News sites are rapidly becoming the newspapers of the digital age. And you know what happened to newspapers. Worldwide, people in all age groups are ditching news sites and publishers’ apps in favor of social media and video networks.
